description.default: SQL connection endpoint URL for the Microsoft Fabric Lakehouse containing employee data (PersonnelNumber, JobTitle, Company/LegalEntity).

label.description: SQL connection endpoint URL for the Microsoft Fabric Lakehouse containing employee data (PersonnelNumber, JobTitle, Company/LegalEntity).

hint.default: From Microsoft Fabric workspace > your Lakehouse > SQL endpoint.

label.description: From Microsoft Fabric workspace > your Lakehouse > SQL endpoint.
